snippet.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of – Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments below…

#VYRLOriginals #RubinaDilaik #ParasChhabra

🎶 Listen 🎧  🎶 Now On 📲 🤳

♫ JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/galat/RF4DWgxfVF8
♫ Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/galat
♫ Wynk - https://wynk.in/u/HmteEng78
♫ Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/album/7v02B7tDzQHcPpgXHsZeEm
♫ Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSJ6KvryY/
♫ Amazon Prime Music - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B091HTH6ZZ
♫ Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/galat/1561142222?i=1561142475
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🎧  Audio Credits

🎤 Singer - Asees Kaur
➟ Music Producer - Sunnyvik
🎶 Composer - Vikas
➟ Lyrics - Raj Fatehpur
➟ Music Produced & Arranged - Sunnyvik & Vikas
➟ Music  Programmer - Arun Maan & Meet Maan
➟ Back Vocals & Alaap - Vikas
➟ Acoustic & Electric Guitar- John Paul
➟ Synth & Piano By - Vikas & Shibashish
➟ Woodwinds - Ajay Parsanna
➟ Mixed & Masterd By - Eric Pillai ( Future Sound Of Bombay )  
➟ Mix Assistant- Michael Edwin Pillai

➟ Poster Design - Aman Khalsi

🎬 Video Credits
➟ Featuring - Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra & Asees Kaur
➟ Produced By - Black And White
➟ Directors - Dilsher Singh And Khushpal Singh
➟ Concept And Creative Director - Pooja Gujral
➟ Asst Dir - Gurdeep And Bunty 
➟ DOP - Robbo 
➟ Editor - Garry Khatrao
➟ Colorist - Onkar
➟ Production Manager - V Sign

● Paras Team
➟ Hair And Makeup By Salman
➟ Personal Boy - Irfan Sheikh
➟ Stylist - Minal

● Rubina Team
➟ Stylist - Ashna Makhijani
➟ Hair - Sharda Jhadhav 
➟ Make up - Jignesh Shah
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
📝 Lyrics

Warka Hauli Hauli Karke Palat Ho Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

Oh Kise Hor Da Hona Chahunde Ne
Mainu Jhootha Pauna Chahunde Ne
Main Samjh Geyi han
Zindagi Cho Mainu Dhakka dena Chahunde Ne

Mere Nal Nal Eh Khali Khali
Falak Roo Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

Main Waqt Kina Barbad Kara
Jad Bewafa Nu Yaad Kara
Main Paagal Ajj vi Har Kam Nu
Tera Naam Len Baad Kara

RAJ RAJ Main Yaad 
Teri Vich Khud Nu Kho Rahi
Main Ajj v Dardi Loka Ton
Barish Vich Roo Rahi

Dhokha Mere Nal Haye
Ab Talak Ho Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

Kabhi Kabhi Tere Dard Mein Haye Sharaab Bhi Piti Hoon
Maine Suna Main Tere Chehre Se Dikhayi Deti Hoon

Mera Jeena Mera Jeena Zeher Ho Gya Hai
Mera Dil Mujhse Rooth Gya Haye Gair Ho Gya Hai

Pal Pal Mereya Saaha Da
Haye Katal Ho Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Official Trailer | Streaming from 7 April
snippet.description:
UPSC - One of the toughest exams in the world. Nothing comes easy when you are preparing for it as an Aspirant. In Delhi's Old Rajinder Nagar, thousands of people come every year with a dream of becoming an IAS officer. It takes a lot of hard work, perseverance and discipline to crack it. But it also takes a lot of heart to endure the pressure. 

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life.

Unacademy & The Viral Fever present ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. Streaming from 7 April on YouTube.


Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar

Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat
Associate Director: Himali Shah
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti
Editor: Tushar Manocha
Music: Rohit Sharma
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar
Casting: Ashish Khare, Shiv Chouhan
Sound Design: Pranit Purao

UPSC fact #27: UPSC syllabus is so vast and diverse ke chahe jitna bhi try karlo Bunny kuch na kuch to chhutega hi!
-Description Guy. 

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt​ #UPSC

This Channel is owned, operated, and managed by, Contagious Online Media Network Private Limited.

snippet.title: Ripper - The Wanted Killer ft. @Karikku | Irul | Netflix India
snippet.description:
What happens when five friends decide to get together for a couple of drinks and risk a close encounter of the murderous kind?

A serial killer, crippling fear and paranoia: Are their fears misplaced, or are they warranted?

Find out how the night unfolds, and if you’re looking for another old-fashioned whodunit, catch Fahadh Faasil and Soubin Shahir in Irul, now streaming on Netflix.

Written & Directed by Nikhil Prasad
Cast: Anu K Aniyan, Arjun Ratan, Jeevan Stephen, Sabareesh Sajjin, Kiran Viyyath, Unni Mathews

DOP/Art: Sunil Karthikeyan
Edit: Anand Mathews
BGM and Sound Design: Charles Nazareth
Sound Engineer: Jishnu Ram
Poster Design: Binoy John
Associate Camera: Blessan K Mon
Colorist: Srik Varier 
DI Studio: Poetic prism and pixels studio
Production Coordinator: Biju Narayan
Production Assistants: Babitha Brahmanand, Vivek V Babu
Subtitles: Elvis John, Reem Nassim
Focus Puller: Appu
Gaffer: Binu P Varghese
Assistant Camera: Renju Jose
Camera Rentals: Mega Focus
Camera Team: Jinesh Balan, Shaji KK, Chandhu
Lights Rentals: Before & After Film Productions
Gimbal: Sachin, Pranav 
News Anchor’s Makeup: Irine’s Bluntbay
Art Assistants: Biju Narayan, Babitha Brahmanand, Vivek V Babu

snippet.title: ગુજરાતમાં ફરી લૉકડાઉન કરવા અંગે વિજય રૂપાણી શું બોલ્યા? | Lockdown in Gujarat
snippet.description:
ગુજરાત હાઇકોર્ટે રાજ્ય સરકારને કોરોનાની ચેઇન તોડવા કર્ફ્યુ લાદવાનું સૂચન કર્યું છે. 
 
હાઇકોર્ટે કહ્યું કે સરકાર 3-4 દિવસ કે વિકએન્ડ કર્ફ્યુ જેવાં પગલાં લે. 
 
રાજ્યમાં લૉકડાઉનની જરૂર પડે તેવી સ્થિત હોવાનું હાઇકોર્ટનું અવલોકન.

#gujaratlockdown #fourdayscurfew #gujaratcoronaupdate #lockdowningujarat



તમે અમારી સાથે જોડાઈ શકો છો :

snippet.title: Prelude of Pushparaj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Prelude of Pushparaj on Mythri Movie Makers. Pushpa is an upcoming Telugu action thriller drama film, with Allu Arjun and Rashmika Mandanna in the lead roles along with Prakash Raj and Jagapathi Babu in key roles & Fahadh Faasil as villain. Written and directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media. Devi Sri Prasad scoring music. The film will be released in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Tamil, Hindi, Kannada, Malayalam languages.

#Pushpa​ #PreludeOfPushparaj #AlluArjun​ #Rashmika​ #Faasil #Sukumar​ #DSP #MythriMovieMakers​

snippet.title: Halla Bol LIVE: Mukhtar Ansari का 'मुख्तार' कौन ? | Anjana Om Kashyap के साथ डिबेट | Aaj Tak Live
snippet.description:
पंजाब की रोपड़ जेल में बंद रहे उत्तर प्रदेश के बाहुबली मुख़्तार अंसारी को लेकर यूपी पुलिस की टीम रोपड़ से निकल चुकी है. मुख्तार को एंबुलेंस में लेकर यूपी के बांदा जेल के लिए टीम रवाना हुई है. एंबुलेंस के आगे-पीछे यूपी पुलिस की कड़ी सुरक्षा है.  करीब 10 गाड़ियों का काफिला बांदा के लिए रवाना हुआ, जिसमें 150 पुलिसकर्मी सवार हैं. कल सुबह तक योगी के गढ़ में होंगे मुख्तार अंसारी, Punjab Police ने Mukhtar को UP Police की कस्टडी में सौंप दिया है. सवाल ये कि आखिर कौन है Mukhtar Ansari का 'मुख्तार' ? देखिए इसपर बहस हल्ला बोल में Anjana Om Kashyap के साथ.

#MukhtarAnsari #RopanJail #BandaJailMukhtarAnsari #UPPolice #HallaBol #ATLivestream

आजतक के साथ देखिये देश-विदेश की सभी महत्वपूर्ण और बड़ी खबरें | Watch the latest Hindi news Live on the World's Most Subscribed News Channel on YouTube. 
#Aajtak #HindiNews
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Aaj Tak Live TV | Aaj Tak | Hindi News | आज तक लाइव

Aaj Tak News Channel: 
आज तक भारत का सर्वश्रेष्ठ हिंदी न्‍यूज चैनल है । आज तक न्‍यूज चैनल राजनीति, मनोरंजन, बॉलीवुड, व्यापार और खेल में नवीनतम समाचारों को शामिल करता है। आज तक न्‍यूज चैनल की लाइव खबरें एवं ब्रेकिंग न्यूज के लिए बने रहें ।

snippet.title: दशा माता की कथा || Dasha Mata Ki Katha || दशा माता व्रत कथा || Dasha mata ki kahani
snippet.description:
दशामाता की कथा || Dasha Mata Ki Katha || दशा माता व्रत कथा || Dasha mata ki kahani
आज 6 अप्रैल 2021 को #दशामाता के व्रत के अवसर पर मैं आप सभी के समक्ष दशा माता की  प्राचीन एवं पौराणिक कथा दशा माता की कथा प्रस्तुत कर रही हूं। दशा माता का व्रत होली के बाद दशमी दिन किया जाता है इसे होली की दशा भी कहा जाता है। दशा माता घर की बुरी दशा को अच्छी दशा में बदल  देती है और  धनधान्य तथा सुख समृद्धि प्रदान  करती हैं।  आज इस वीडियो में  मैं दशा माता की  पुराणों में वर्णित दशा माता व्रत  कथा लेकर आई हूं। दशा माता की कहानी के अनुसार राजा नल ने दशा माता के डोरे का अपमान किया था और परिणाम स्वरूप राज्य तथा पुत्र सुख सभी से वंचित हो गए थे। फिर उनकी पत्नी रानी दमयंती ने दशा माता का व्रत करके राजसी ठाठ-बाट, पुत्र पुत्र धनधान्य तथा सुख समृद्धि को पुनः प्राप्त किया। हे दशा माता,  जैसे आपने राजा नल और रानी दमयंती को उनका राज्य, मान सम्मान तथा सुख समृद्धि  फिर से प्रदान की, वैसे ही हम सब की दशा को भी हमेशा अच्छा  बनाए रखना। हम सब पर अपनी कृपा करना मां दशा माता। चलिए देखते हैं दशा माता की व्रत की कथा और जोर से बोलते हैं दशा माता की जय | दशा माता की जय

Hello friends, today on 6th April 2021, on the occasion of fasting of Dasha Mata, I am presenting to you all the ancient and mythological Dasha Mata vrat katha . The Dasha Mata vrat is observed on the tenth day after Holi and people listen #dashamatavratkatha on his day Holi Dasha. Dasha Mata transforms the bad state of the house into a good state and provides prosperity and happiness. Today in this video of Dasha mata ki vrat katha , I have brought the katha mentioned in Puranas of Dasha Mata. According to the Dash mata ki kahani,  King Nal insulted Dasha Mata's thread and as a result the he was deprived of his kingdom. Then his wife Rani Damayanti observed Dasha Mata vrat and regained d happiness and prosperity. O'Dasha Mata, just as you gave Raja Nal and Rani Damayanti their kingdom, honor and happiness and prosperity again, likewise keep the condition of all of us always good. God bless us all, Mother Dasha. let was watch Dasha mata ka vrat ki katha and say loudly #dashamata ki jai

Singer : Vineeth Sreenivasan, Swetha Mohan, Ziya ul Haq

Music Composed, Programmed and Arranged by Ronnie Raphael
Lyricist : B K Harinarayanan
Sufi Lyrics : Shafi Kollam
Flute, Sax: Josy Alappuzha 
Guitars, Mandolin, Bass: Sumesh Parameswar 
All Percussions: Sunil Kumar
Recorded at SS Digital, K7 Studios, Krishna Digidesign, RR Studios.
Mixed and Mastered by Renjith Viswanathan @RV Studios,Qatar.


Starring Mohanlal, Pranav Mohanlal, Arjun, Suniel Shetty, Prabhu, Manju Warrier, Suhasini, Keerthi Suresh, Kalyani Priyadarshan, Fazil, Siddique, Nedumudi Venu, Innocent, Ashok Selvan and Others.
Co Producers: Dr. Roy C J, Santhosh T Kuruvilla

Cinematography : Thiru
Screenplay: Priyadarshan, Ani I.V. SASI

snippet.description:
S8UL IS PROUD TO SHOWCASE ONE OF THE MOST LUXURIOUS gaming facility in India. 
Valuating at 1 Million Dollar and built at 15000 sq. feet, it will be also the largest gaming facility in India.
@MortaL @8bit Thug and @8bit Goldy show you around this exclusive facility with a whopping 4 floors with all the state of art facility, which includes Streaming Cabins, Living Rooms, Recreational Areas, Modern Kitchen and Content Creation Space for all our Athletes and Content Creators.
We at S8UL, thank you all for making this possible and we ensure this is JUST THE BEGINNING.
Also together, let's take the future of gaming in India to Greater Heights.
#S8UL
Make sure to Follow us at :

snippet.title: Manjhi - The Mountain Man | Scene 8 | Nawazuddin Siddiqui | Radhika Apte | Viacom18 Studios
snippet.description:
Manjhi – The Mountain Man is a 2015 Indian Hindi-language biographical film based on the life of Dashrath Manjhi. Manjhi, widely known as the "Mountain Man", was a poor labourer in Gehlaur village, near Gaya in Bihar, India, who carved a path 9.1 metres (30 ft) wide and 110 metres (360 ft) long through a hill 7.6 metres (25 ft) high, using only a hammer and chisel.

#NawazuddinSiddiqui enacted the role of #DashrathManjhi, while Radhika Apte played Manjhi's wife. The film was released worldwide on 21 August 2015.

#ManjhiTheMountainMan 

Viacom18 Studios Handles :-

Facebook:- https://www.facebook.com/Viacom18Studios/
Twitter :- https://twitter.com/Viacom18Studios
Instagram:- https://www.instagram.com/viacom18studios

About Polimer News:

Polimer News brings unbiased News and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.

Polimer News has evolved as a 24 hours Tamil News satellite TV channel. Polimer is the second largest MSO in TN catering to millions of TV viewing homes across 10 districts of TN. Founded by Mr. P.V. Kalyana Sundaram, the company currently runs 8 basic cable TV channels in various parts of TN and Polimer TV, a fully integrated Tamil GEC reaching out to millions of Tamil viewers across the world. The channel has state of the art production facility in Chennai. Besides a library of more than 350 movies on an exclusive basis , the channel also beams 8 hours of original content every day. The channel has extended its vision to various genres including Reality. In short, Polimer is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Polimer’s biggest strength is its people. The channel has some of the best talent on its rolls. A clear vision backed by the best brains gives Polimer a clear cut edge in the crowded Tamil TV landscape.

snippet.title: KURUTHI Official Teaser | Prithviraj | Manu Warrier | Jakes Bejoy | Roshan Mathew | Anish Pallyal
snippet.description:
KURUTHI is an upcoming Malayalam Language Feature Film produced by Supriya Menon under the banner of Prithviraj Productions.
 
Cast: Prithviraj Sukumaran |   Roshan Mathew |   Murali Gopy | Shine Tom Chacko | Mamukkoya | Srindaa | Manikanda Rajan | Naslen Gafoor | Sagar Surya | Navas Vallikkunnu. 
  
Produced By | SUPRIYA MENON 
Director | MANU WARRIER 
Writer | ANISH PALLYAL 
DOP | ABINANDHAN RAMANUJAM

song lyric
KULHI GITIL

 Kulhi gitil Gati hara, 
Minan Gate tangi tanra, 
Tisem idin Gate ape orak,

am nutum sasang sari 
benaoo minak sakom Churi,
lay me tisok gatin idiy sari.. 

Aeganj apunj saprao
 more horak neda din 
Unrenj badiy amak sasang Sari 
Dawra renj horog amak sakom churi,, 

Katha gatin sariy tam 
seterok ann rajan bhajan 
Sindur baha Ten baha me 
Rahi chawdal atenin idi miya...!

katha gatem iman kan  
Katha alum hirin tam,   
Inn man guni bhavie setak tikin,              tisem seterok Sari rajan bhajan,, 
 
hoy hudur bijili jari.   Nenda din Inn
seter Sari samaj tala khon inn apnar me Jay jug lagit Ten bundi miya,,


Lyric. Love boy

snippet.title: Bijapur naxal attack पर cobra commando balraj singh ने जो बताया आपको अंदर से हिला देगा
snippet.description:
तेरा तुझको अर्पण के लिए यहां क्लिक करें - https://rb.gy/e6w2nf

Sardar Balraj took off the turban to save the life of fellow jawan. Kobra commando soldier Balraj Singh, while fighting with Naxals, saw that fellow officer SI Abhishek Pandey was shot at by them. Balraj Singh voiced many times for the help of SI Pandey, but no one reached for help. On which, when Sardar Balraj did not get anything to save the life of fellow officer, Balraj Singh took took off his turabn. Watch this exclusive conversation with balraj singh.

snippet.title: বিদালার পা - Gopal Bhar - Full Episode - Best Of Gopal Bhar
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SONY AATH Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBz9qbqujcjIavFmBJW2oZw?sub_confirmation=1

The minister of Raja Krishnachandra plans to buy a shop in the village. The price is fixed at 40 thousand and in order to buy the shop, he approaches three other people of the village. He is insisting them to make a partnership with him.


About Gopal Bhar:
-----------------------------
Gopal Bhar was a legendary court jester in medieval Bengal. He was in the court of Raja Krishnachandra, the famous king of Nadia in the 18th century AD. Such was the genius of Gopal that the King considered him as a Navaratna of his court. His statue can still be seen in the palace of Raja Krishnachandra. Stories about his exploits are narrated in Bengal to this day and are immortalized in countless short stories. The stories are short, beautiful, humorous, and have a specific social message. Gopal Bhar is famous for stories of his wisdom, in which he outwits other fellow courtiers.

snippet.description:
hi friends welcome to my lakshmi paakashaale .........🙏🙏🙏


ನನ್ನ ಸದಸ್ಯರಿಗೆ ನನ್ನ ಚಾನೆಲ್ ಗೆ ಆತ್ಮೀಯ ಸ್ವಾಗತ ಇವತ್ತಿನ ವಿಡಿಯೋ ಮೊಲಕ ನಾವು ಅತಿ ರುಚಿಕರವಾಗಿ ಮತ್ತು ಸುಲಭವಾಗಿ ಆಲೂಗಡ್ಡೆ ಆಮ್ಲೇಟ್ ಮಾಡೋದು ಹೇಗೆ ಅಂತ ತೋರಿಸುತ್ತೇವೆ ಈ ವಿಧಾನ ಮತ್ತು ವಿಡಿಯೋ ಇಷ್ಟ ಆಗಿದ್ದರೆ ಲೈಕ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಮತ್ತು ನಿಮ್ಮ ಗೆಳೆಯರಿಗೆ ಶೇರ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಧನ್ಯವಾದಗಳು........😊🙏🙏🙏🙏🙏

snippet.title: Don't Waste Your Money - Q&A #6 With Sandeep Maheshwari
snippet.description:
"Don't just spend money; make the best use of it."

Sandeep Maheshwari is a name among millions who struggled, failed and surged ahead in search of success, happiness and contentment. Just like any middle class guy, he too had a bunch of unclear dreams and a blurred vision of his goals in life. All he had was an undying learning attitude to hold on to. Rowing through ups and downs, it was time that taught him the true meaning of his life.

snippet.title: Tum Na Jaane Kis Jahan Mein Kho Gaye | Sanam
snippet.description:
Our #SANAMrendition of the song ‘Tum Na Jaane Kis Jahan Mein Kho Gaye’.

Shot in a 400+ year old bungalow in Goa. It’s almost like every little thing shown in the video has it’s own story to tell. We hope the intensity of the lyrics, melody and visuals keep you gripped till the end! 

Lots of love! 

Like, Share, Comment, Subscribe and STAY SAFE !!! 

#SANAMsingle #weareSANAM

snippet.description:

#ColorsTV #BarristerBabu

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :

Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first “Barrister Babu” of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

About Super Dancer 4 : 
---------------------------------------------------
Now in its fourth season, Super Dancer is a popular children's dance reality show. Spearheaded by Bollywood actress Shilpa Shetty, renowned choreographer Geeta Kapoor and Bollywood Director Anurag Basu, the show looks for 'Dance ka Kal'. After nationwide auditions, the judges select 12 children who are extraordinary dancers, aged between 4 to 13. These 12 dancers are paired with popular and able choreographers, the Super Gurus. Along with their Gurus, the kids compete to become Super Dancer - Dance Ka Kal.

snippet.description:

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3138: Popatlal Misplaces The Mango Box
---------------------------------------------------------
The courier guy had misplaced the parcel so he came back to exchange the parcel and handover the actuall parcel which Popatlalt is supposed to recieve.In the mean while Popatlal starts to preach the courier guy how he should perform his duties . The courier guy is in hurry so he asks Popatlal to give him the box of Mangoes then is when Popatlal realizes that he has misplaced the box of mangoes to know more watch the full episode.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile

 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Khul Lagla Official Video - New Marathi Love Songs 2021 | Rohit Raut, Asmeeta, Ankit, Prasad Gadhve
snippet.description:
Presenting Beautiful Superhit Marathi Romantic Song 2021 (New Marathi Song 2021) 'खुळ लागलं Khul Lagla' by Rohit Raut. Music composed & lyrics penned by Prasad Gadhave. Song starring Asmeeta Deshmukh & Ankit Gawli.

Subscribe/सबस्क्राईब @Everest Marathi on below link for Marathi Movie Updates.
http://bit.ly/EverestMarathi

► Lajtana - https://youtu.be/gHd6l6AFmd4
► Nagpuri Swag - https://youtu.be/njy0OxhYfBI

► Pakhulichya Pankhawani - https://youtu.be/MmCXa8BTwrs
► Pavsa - https://youtu.be/_Y4KX9w7tfU
► Kahani Majhi - https://youtu.be/RMKEB2neGFo
► Dhingana - https://youtu.be/MoUUq2ouw60
► Man Maaze - https://youtu.be/RBk7QR-ojaw
► Jeev Majha Jaeel - https://youtu.be/hGmwSj56GWU

Audio Credits
Singer: Rohit Raut
Lyrics & Music Director: Prasad Gadhave
Music Program & Arranged Mixed by Tejas Chavan
Mastered by Ajinkya Dhapare
Flute: Bhalchandra Adsul
Rhythm: Kedar More & Ruturaj Kore
Bass Guiter: Partik Bidkar
Chorus: Tejal Patil & Akshata Swami
Vocal Recording: Ajivasan Studio, Mumbai

Video Credits
Directed by Aniket Raju Baravkar
Cast: Asmeeta Deshmukh & Ankit Gawli
D O P: Aniket Baravkar , Akash Kudale
2nd Camera: Tanmay Pore
Edit & DI: Akshay Kadu Patil
Art Director: Dnyanada Gorawade
Production Head: Shubham Sonawane, Rushikesh Sitape
Production Designer: Sahil Swami, Ashish Pandit
Still Photography: Pranav Mhetre ,Sidhesh Kamble
Production Management: Nilesh Gore Karan Somawashi
Mekeup: Rekha Ratod
Special Thanks: Rarjeet Tambe, Gorashka Bahskar, Ramdas Shinde Patil, Om Metals & Engineers

Lyrics:
खुळ लागलं....

नजर ही भिरभिरली
पाखरान या हेरली
पिरमाच रान माझं
दडू दडू बावरली

राणी जूळू लागलं
पिरमाच नवं नवं हे
खुळ लागलं.....

बहरल्या रातीला नजरेत चांदणी
चंद्र कसा माझ्याकड बघतोय चोरुनी
जागपणी सपान हे येड तुझ्या रूपानं हे
रातभर नादान हे जागू लागल
चमचमत रुप तुझ दिसू लागलं

राणी जुळू लागल
पिरमाच नवं नवं हे
खुळ लागलं....

तू येता इश्काच भनानल वार
गालावर लाली का सांग नाग खरं
आज सारं उमगलं
मनातलं वळखलं
दिनरात माग माग फिरू लागला
गाली गाली हसू तुझं कळू लागलं

राणी जुळू लागलं
पिरमाच नवं नवं हे
खुळ लागलं....

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1211 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Soumya learns about Mahi's sinister plan for her when she overhears her conversation with a strange man. Watch the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode and find out more
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

Episode 3137: Why Did Popatlal Receive A Box Of Mangoes?
---------------------------------------------------------
Popatlal receives the gift he ordered for Pooja. But he finds out that instead of cosmetics he received a box full of mangoes. He calls up the delivery guy to tell him that he has misplaced his order with someone else. He keeps on pestering the delivery guy by calling him again and again and asking about his order. To know more watch the full episode.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Gifted Shirt है Jetha को Tight! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | Mini Episodes | Webisodes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the mini-episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7YXlq18P_6laPNbm0MuqEuG

About The Show:
----------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: कोल्ड कोको ड्रिंक बनाने की विधि - Surti Cold Cocoa / Summer Drink Recipe - CookingShooking
snippet.description:
Dosto, Surat ki famous Cold Coco Recipe share kar raha hu, garmi bhagane ke lie mast recipe hai ye.. Super Chilled Chocolate drink hai ye, cocoa powder, doodh, corn flour se banti hai easily :)

CookingShooking ko jarur subscribe karein -  https://goo.gl/MH3A4r

Instagram me follow jarur karein - https://www.instagram.com/cooking.shooking

English videos - https://goo.gl/Sxk4Fp

Ingredients : 
Doodh / Milk - 600ml / 2 glass
Corn Flour - 2 tbsp
Cocoa Powder - 2 tbsp
Cheeni - 4 tbsp
Dark Chocolate - 70g
Ice Cubes - serving ke lie

Kitchen Products
Measuring Cup & Spoon Set - https://amzn.to/2KZBVpq
Chopper for Fine Cutting - https://amzn.to/2UCCo7X
Mixer Grinder - https://amzn.to/2XTI1jW 
Power Blender for Smoothie, Shakes - https://amzn.to/37ozHM6
Hand Blender+Mixer+Chopper - https://amzn.to/2MOHjhL
Gas Sandwich Griller - https://amzn.to/37mvfgW
Good NonStick Pan - https://amzn.to/2zl0hsa (steel spoon safe)
Kitchen Weight Scale - https://amzn.to/2ug3G65 
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2N2wzuf (keep in freezer)
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2KZSkdn (small pack)
Pizza Screen - https://amzn.to/2m4zpn6 (3 pack - 6,7,8 inches)
Parchment Paper - much better than butter paper, and it is reusable - https://amzn.to/2MZFGvC
Whipping Cream - https://amzn.to/2ugPB8m
Oven For Baking - https://amzn.to/2udP3A5 (28liter Good for 3-4 people)

snippet.title: PESHAWARI CHAWAL | Pakistan Special Golden Pulao Recipe Cooking in Indian Village | Mutton Recipes
snippet.description:
The world has a lot of most tasty pulao recipes with different names like Chana Mewa Pulao, Zaiqa Chawal, and more. Today we cook Pakistan's special Beef Chana Mewa Pulao recipe using mutton instead of Beef.

We use Chana and Dry grapes as the main ingredients for this pulao recipe.

That taste is delicious!

snippet.title: Kaalapani 25 Years Special Video | Priyadarshan | Mohanlal | Prabhu | Linto Kurian
snippet.description:
25 Years of KAALAPANI 

Kaalapani (transl. Cellular Jail) is a 1996 Indian Malayalam-language epic historical drama film co-written and directed by Priyadarshan. Set in 1915, the film focuses on the lives of Indian freedom fighters incarcerated in the Cellular Jail in Andaman and Nicobar Islands during the British Raj. The ensemble cast includes Mohanlal, Prabhu Ganesan, Tabu, Amrish Puri, Nedumudi Venu, Sreenivasan, Tinnu Anand, Annu Kapoor, Alex Draper, Sankaradi, and Vineeth. The film was produced by Mohanlal for Pranavam Arts in association with R. Mohan's Shogun Films.

The film is about the lives of prisoners in British India who are brought to Kālā Pānī, the Cellular Jail in Port Blair, Andaman and Nicobar Islands. The name Kalapani is derived from the mode of imprisonment in British India. Ilaiyaraaja composed the music, the cinematography was by Santosh Sivan, and the editing by N. Gopalakrishnan. The film introduced Dolby Stereo into Malayalam cinema. It was made on a budget of ₹6.00 crore, making it the costliest Malayalam film made until then.

Kaalapani was released on 6 April 1996 in 450 theaters worldwide, which was the largest release for any Indian film until then. The film is now regarded as one of the classics in Malayalam cinema.[2] Originally made in Malayalam, the film was dubbed and released in Hindi as Saza-E-Kala Pani, Tamil as Siraichalai, and in Telugu as Kaala Pani. Amitabh Bachchan bought the Hindi dubbing rights, besides narrating the prologue for the Hindi version.[3] The film won three National Film Awards, including the awards for Best Art Direction (Sabu Cyril), Best Special Effects (S. T. Venky), and Best Cinematography (Santosh Sivan). Along with that it won six Kerala State Film Awards.

Softwares Used : Final Cut Pro X, After Effects
Edited by : Linto Kurian
Thumbnail Design : ALBERT LFA
Facebook : https://m.facebook.com/linto.kurian.54
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/linto_kurian/

snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Trailer of the Action Political Drama movie Kodiyil Oruvan. 

Kodiyil Oruvan is an upcoming movie that has Vijay Antony and Aathmika playing the lead roles. Directed by Ananda Krishnan and Music by Nivas K Prasanna.
